name: Specific Impulse (Isp) Calculator
description: Calculate specific impulse based on thrust and propellant mass flow rate.
formulaDescription: Specific impulse is thrust per unit weight flow (g0 = 9.80665 m/s²).

example.explanation: At 1,000,000 N thrust and 340 kg/s propellant flow, Isp is around 300 s.

faqs.question: Why is Isp measured in seconds?
faqs.answer: Isp is expressed in seconds because it is the effective exhaust velocity divided by g0.
